title: Sports
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: 3 INDYCAR Drivers Who Could Dethrone Alex Palou In 2026, Per Will Buxton
items.description: Alex Palou is clearly the driver to beat, but there are a few racers Will Buxton has his eyes on for the 2026 INDYCAR championship.

items.title: Tre White Leads No. 14 Kansas Over No. 5 Houston For Cougars' 3rd Straight Loss
items.description: Tre White scored a season-high 23 points and No. 14 Kansas bounced back from a surprising defeat with a 69-56 victory over No. 5 Houston.

items.title: Seth Trimble Scores Career-High 30 as No. 18 UNC Holds Off No. 24 Louisville
items.description: Seth Trimble had a career-high 30 points and hit two key free throws with 12.3 seconds left to help UNC hold off Louisville.

items.title: Kevin Harvick: 23XI Racing Could Be 'Contenders All Year' After Hot Start
items.description: Kevin Harvick explained what the early success of Michael Jordan's 23XI racing team could mean for the 2026 Cup Series season.

items.title: Tigers Ace Tarik Skubal Making Just One Start For Team USA At WBC
items.description: Detroit Tigers ace Tarik Skubal plans to start once for the United States in the World Baseball Classic.

items.title: Arsenal back on track after big derby win; Real Madrid suffer shock LaLiga loss; more
items.description: Arsenal didn't panic ahead of Sunday's north London derby, and it paid off. Plus: Man City keep the pressure on, and Real Madrid suffer a shock to fal...

items.title: 'Raw' results: Styles WWE Hall of Fame-bound, Elimination Chamber matches set
items.description: A action-packed Raw had injuries, celebrities and the newest member of the WWE Hall of Fame.

items.title: AP Top 25 poll reaction: OU, Iowa and TCU on the rise
items.description: The new AP Top 25 is here! Which teams moved up? Which team replaced Tennessee, which fell out of the poll?

items.title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool, Man United, Real Madrid eye Van de Ven
items.description: Tottenham Hotspur defender Micky van de Ven is on the radar of Liverpool, Manchester United and Real Madrid. Transfer Talk has the latest.

items.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Welcome to the 'locks,' Wisconsin
items.description: Wisconsin cemented its status as a 'lock' Sunday, though the SEC continues to lead the Big Ten in projected bids.
